# Open-Meteo

> Open-Meteo is a free, open-source weather API with no API key required for non-commercial use. It provides high-resolution weather forecast data from national weather services, historical weather data, air quality, marine forecasts, climate projections, geocoding, elevation, flood, satellite radiation, and seasonal forecasts.

Open-Meteo aggregates weather data from over 20 national weather services worldwide, including ECMWF, DWD, NOAA, Meteo-France, UK Met Office, MET Norway, and many more. All APIs use a unified interface with latitude/longitude coordinates and support JSON, GeoJSON, CSV, and XLSX formats. The API is free for non-commercial use up to 10,000 daily requests.

## Weather Forecast API

- [Weather Forecast API docs](https://open-meteo.com/en/docs): Main interactive API documentation with parameter builder, model selection, and live API responses
- [ECMWF](https://open-meteo.com/en/docs/ecmwf-api): ECMWF IFS high-resolution forecast (9km / 0.25°) and AIFS (0.25°)
- [DWD Germany](https://open-meteo.com/en/docs/dwd-api): ICON model family - global, EU, and D2 domains
- [NOAA GFS](https://open-meteo.com/en/docs/gfs-api): GFS seamless, global, HRRR, NBM, NAM, GraphCast, AI GFS
- [Météo-France](https://open-meteo.com/en/docs/meteofrance-api): ARPEGE and AROME model family
- [UK Met Office](https://open-meteo.com/en/docs/ukmo-api): Global deterministic (10km) and UK deterministic (2km)
- [MET Norway](https://open-meteo.com/en/docs/metno-api): Nordic seamless model
- [GEM Canada](https://open-meteo.com/en/docs/gem-api): Global, regional, and HRDPS models
- [JMA Japan](https://open-meteo.com/en/docs/jma-api): MSM and GSM models
- [KMA Korea](https://open-meteo.com/en/docs/kma-api): LDPS and GDPS models
- [BOM Australia](https://open-meteo.com/en/docs/bom-api): ACCESS Global model
- [CMA China](https://open-meteo.com/en/docs/cma-api): CMA GRAPES global model
- [KNMI Netherlands](https://open-meteo.com/en/docs/knmi-api): HARMONIE-AROME Europe and Netherlands
- [DMI Denmark](https://open-meteo.com/en/docs/dmi-api): HARMONIE-AROME Europe
- [MeteoSwiss](https://open-meteo.com/en/docs/meteoswiss-api): ICON CH1 and CH2 (Switzerland)
- [ItaliaMeteo](https://open-meteo.com/en/docs/italia-meteo-arpae-api): ICON-2I (Italy)
- [GeoSphere Austria](https://open-meteo.com/en/docs/geosphere-austria-api): AROME Austria

## Specialized APIs

- [Historical Weather API](https://open-meteo.com/en/docs/historical-weather-api): ERA5 and CERRA reanalysis data from 1940
- [Historical Forecast API](https://open-meteo.com/en/docs/historical-forecast-api): Past weather forecasts with known model versions
- [Ensemble API](https://open-meteo.com/en/docs/ensemble-api): Ensemble forecast data
- [Ensemble Mean API](https://open-meteo.com/en/docs/ensemble-mean-api): Ensemble mean forecast data
- [Single Runs API](https://open-meteo.com/en/docs/single-runs-api): Individual model run data
- [Previous Runs API](https://open-meteo.com/en/docs/previous-runs-api): Previous model run data
- [Seasonal Forecast API](https://open-meteo.com/en/docs/seasonal-forecast-api): Seasonal climate forecasts
- [Climate Change API](https://open-meteo.com/en/docs/climate-api): CMIP6 climate projections
- [Marine Weather API](https://open-meteo.com/en/docs/marine-weather-api): Ocean weather data
- [Air Quality API](https://open-meteo.com/en/docs/air-quality-api): Air pollution and air quality data
- [Satellite Radiation API](https://open-meteo.com/en/docs/satellite-radiation-api): Satellite-based solar radiation data
- [Geocoding API](https://open-meteo.com/en/docs/geocoding-api): City and location search by name
- [Elevation API](https://open-meteo.com/en/docs/elevation-api): Elevation data
- [Flood API](https://open-meteo.com/en/docs/flood-api): Flood forecast data

## Optional

- [Model Updates](https://open-meteo.com/en/docs/model-updates): Changelog and updates for weather model configurations
- [Open-Meteo GitHub](https://github.com/open-meteo/open-meteo): Source code and API library
- [About](https://open-meteo.com/en/about): About Open-Meteo
- [Features](https://open-meteo.com/en/features): Feature overview and comparisons
- [Pricing](https://open-meteo.com/en/pricing): Usage limits and pricing for commercial use
- [Terms of Service](https://open-meteo.com/en/terms): Terms and conditions
- [Licence](https://open-meteo.com/en/licence): Licence information
- [OpenAPI Spec](https://open-meteo.com/docs/openapi.yml): OpenAPI 3.0 specification for the Open-Meteo API
- [API Documentation GitHub](https://github.com/open-meteo/open-meteo-website): Website and documentation source code
